translations.ar: هناك طقم أدوات مائدة واحد ناقص.
translations.hi: कटलरी का एक सेट कम है.

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular pronoun; here an impersonal/expletive subject with manquer to express that something is missing.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; in impersonal construction meaning ‘to be missing/lacking’.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing a count noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; here refers to a table place setting for one person.

sentences.target: Tu rajoutes un couvert, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty ʁa.ʒut œ̃ ku.vɛʁ sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu rajoutes un couvert, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty ʁa.ʒut œ̃ ku.vɛʁ sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you add one more place setting, please?
translations.es: Pon un cubierto más, por favor.
translations.de: Bitte füge noch ein Gedeck hinzu.
translations.it: Per favore aggiungi un coperto in più.
translations.ko: 자리 세팅 하나만 더 해줘, 부탁해.
translations.pt: Podes pôr mais um conjunto de talheres, por favor.
translations.vi: Vui lòng thêm một bộ đồ ăn nữa.
translations.ar: من فضلك أضف طقم أدوات مائدة واحداً.
translations.nl: Leg alsjeblieft nog een couvert neer.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, додай ще один прибор.
translations.hu: Kérlek, tegyél le még egy terítéket.
translations.hi: कृपया एक कटलरी सेट और रख दो.
translations.nb: Vennligst legg til en ekstra kuvert.
translations.id: Tolong tambah satu perangkat makan lagi.
translations.sv: Lägg gärna till ett kuvert till.
translations.ro: Te rog să mai adaugi un set de tacâmuri.
translations.da: Læg venligst en ekstra kuvert på.
translations.ja: もう一組セッティングを足してください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun (informal address).
Present indicative 2nd person singular of ‘rajouter’ (‘to add’); here used as a polite request in context.
Indefinite article, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular (‘place setting’).
Subordinating conjunction; part of the polite formula ‘si … te plaît’ (‘please’: literally ‘if it pleases you’).
3rd-person singular pronoun serving as the (dummy) subject of ‘plaît’ in the fixed polite expression.
2nd-person singular clitic pronoun (indirect object) governed by ‘plaire’.
Present indicative 3rd person singular of ‘plaire’; completes the idiomatic polite request ‘si il te plaît’.

sentences.target: On a six couverts pour ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a sis ku.vɛʁ puʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On a six couverts pour ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a sis ku.vɛʁ puʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We have six place settings for tonight.
translations.es: Tenemos seis cubiertos para esta noche.
translations.de: Wir haben heute Abend sechs Gedecke.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤에는 자리 세팅이 여섯 개야.
translations.zh-Hans: 今晚我们摆了六套餐具。
translations.yue: 今晚我哋擺好咗六副餐具。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером у нас шесть приборов.
translations.pt: Temos seis conjuntos de talheres para esta noite.
translations.he: יש לנו שישה סטים של סכו״ם לערב.
translations.tr: Bu akşam için altı servisimiz var.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng ta có sáu bộ đồ ăn.
translations.ar: لدينا ستة أطقم أدوات مائدة الليلة.
translations.uk: На сьогодні ввечері у нас шість приборів.
translations.hi: आज रात के लिए हमारे पास छह कटलरी सेट हैं.
translations.pl: Na dziś wieczór mamy sześć nakryć.
translations.nb: Vi har seks kuverter til i kveld.
translations.id: Untuk malam ini kita punya enam perangkat makan.
translations.sv: Vi har sex kuvert till ikväll.
translations.ro: Avem șase seturi de tacâmuri pentru diseară.
translations.cs: Na dnešní večer máme šest příborů.
translations.da: Vi har seks kuverter til i aften.
translations.fi: Täksi illaksi meillä on kuusi kattausta.
translations.ja: 今夜はセッティングが六組あります。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; indefinite ‘one’, commonly used in speech for ‘we’.
Main verb ‘avoir’, present indicative 3rd person singular agreeing with ‘on’.
Cardinal numeral modifying the noun that follows.
Common noun, masculine plural; plural of ‘couvert’ (‘place settings’).
Preposition introducing a purpose/time complement.
Demonstrative determiner; with a time noun forms ‘this + time’ (here ‘this evening’).
Common noun; with ‘ce’ yields the time expression ‘ce soir’ (‘tonight/this evening’).

sentences.target: Je pose un couvert pour Léa.

translations.fr: Je pose un couvert pour Léa.
translations.en: I'm setting a place for Léa.
translations.ko: 레아를 위해 식기 세트를 놓고 있어.
translations.pt: Ponho um conjunto de talheres para a Léa.
translations.vi: Tôi bày một bộ đồ ăn cho Léa.
translations.nl: Ik dek een plek voor Léa.
translations.hi: मैं लेआ के लिए जगह तैयार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Στρώνω ένα κουβέρ για τη Λέα.
translations.nb: Jeg dekker en plass til Léa.
translations.id: Saya menyiapkan perangkat makan untuk Léa.
translations.sv: Jag dukar en plats för Léa.
translations.ro: Pun un set de tacâmuri pentru Léa.
translations.da: Jeg dækker en plads til Léa.
translations.ja: レアのためにセッティングしています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative 1st person singular of ‘poser’ (‘to put/place’).
Indefinite article, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular (‘place setting’).
Preposition marking beneficiary/recipient.
Proper noun (female given name); complement of ‘pour’.
